text: Hello. Hello. Hi. This is Chelsea and I'm reaching out because we pulled up your Medicare profile and there's a note here showing your 2026 plan update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation from you so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. This is confirmed for me. Do you have both Part A and Part B? I am not old enough for Medicare. But if the government would like to give it to me, I will take it. But I'm not old enough. Sorry. It looks like you don't qualify for the plans. Have a good day.
